title: Enphase Energy (ENPH) Q3 2023 Earnings Highlights
text: Enphase reported Q3 2023 revenue of $551.1 million, representing a sequential decline from Q2's $711.1 million. The company attributed this to macroeconomic headwinds, with U.S. revenues dropping 16% and European revenues falling 34%. Despite the top-line pressure, the firm achieved a non-GAAP gross margin of 48.4%, an increase from 46.2% in Q2 2023. The company generated GAAP net income of $114.0 million alongside non-GAAP net income of $141.8 million. Enphase distributed approximately 1,585.6 megawatts DC of microinverters along with 86.2 megawatt hours of IQ Batteries. The company maintained cash, cash equivalents, and marketable securities totaling $1.78 billion and repurchased roughly 846,648 shares for approximately $110.0 million. Management provided cautious Q4 2023 guidance, projecting revenues between $300 million and $350 million, with non-GAAP gross margins expected in the 48.0% to 51.0% range.
